scripts.check:importador: node --check importador/reconstruct-wxr.mjs && node --check importador/media-recovery.mjs && npm run import:wxr:dry && npm run import:media:plan -- --limit=5
scripts.check: npm run check:ts && npm run check:html && npm run check:authors
scripts.test: npm run check && bundle exec ruby scripts/jekyll_local.rb build
scripts.build: npm run build:ts && bundle exec ruby scripts/jekyll_local.rb build
scripts.build:prod: npm run build:ts && cross-env JEKYLL_ENV=production bundle exec ruby scripts/jekyll_local.rb build
scripts.dev: cross-env JEKYLL_ENV=development bundle exec ruby scripts/jekyll_local.rb serve --host 127.0.0.1 --livereload --drafts
scripts.dev-mini: cross-env RUBYOPT="-W:no-deprecated" JEKYLL_ENV=production bundle exec ruby scripts/jekyll_local.rb serve --host 127.0.0.1 --force_polling --livereload --drafts
scripts.dev-live: cross-env RUBYOPT="-W:no-deprecated" JEKYLL_ENV=production bundle exec ruby scripts/jekyll_local.rb serve --host 127.0.0.1 --force_polling --livereload
